# Shot 50 priceInsight - Single-Shot Certification Asset

## Source timing

- Shot ID: shot_50
- Scene type: priceInsight
- Reference clip: C:\Users\Administrator\.codex\references\extracted-shots\shot_50_priceInsight_47.0-49.0.mp4
- Actual start time in source video: 47.042s
- Actual end time in source video: 49.000s
- Duration: 1.958s
- Certification status: candidate only; approved=false; allowedInFactory=false

## Visual hierarchy

1. Background layer: soft desk/product environment with pastel lighting. In the reusable version this becomes an abstract commerce-stage gradient plus restrained depth shapes, not a copied desk, prop, logo, or product scene.
2. Main device/product surface: a centered tablet/browser frame. It anchors the shot and provides the commercial context for a pricing or offer insight.
3. Price insight badge: a compact sticker/card near the left-lower portion of the device. This is the semantic focus and must stay inside safe area.
4. Insight table/card: a small floating panel over the interface that implies comparison, plan details, or pricing evidence without reproducing source content.
5. Secondary proof chips: optional small emoji-like or status chips above the interface. These are decorative in the reference and should only be retained if they carry semantic proof.

## Element timing, direction, speed, settle

- 0%-100% / commerceBackdropDrift: background moves very slowly left-up with a mild scale increase. Speed is low and continuous; it should not distract from the price badge.
- 5%-34% / deviceShelfPush: main device enters from slight lower-right with scale 0.92 to 1.0 and a tiny rotateY correction. It settles by 34%.
- 18%-46% / priceBadgePop: price badge pops from lower-left toward its final anchor with scale 0.72 to 1.0. Fast elastic pop; must settle by 46% to avoid cheap sticker bounce.
- 34%-66% / insightPanelSlide: insight panel slides from right with slight upward motion and blur removal. Medium speed; settles by 66%.
- 52%-78% / valueRowsReveal: table rows/mini bars reveal downward in a stagger. This provides readable data motion without copying source data.
- 68%-88% / savingsEmphasisPulse: price/savings highlight receives one restrained emphasis pulse. No repeated flashing.
- 86%-100% / priceInsightSettle: whole composition holds with a tiny push-in and opacity stabilization for readability.

## Reusable atomic motions

- commerceBackdropDrift: soft commercial background parallax.
- deviceShelfPush: centered product/browser surface push-in.
- priceBadgePop: semantic price badge entrance.
- insightPanelSlide: evidence card/table slide-in.
- valueRowsReveal: staggered data rows reveal.
- savingsEmphasisPulse: one-time price/savings emphasis.
- priceInsightSettle: final readability settle.

## Reference-only decoration to exclude

- Physical desk props, brand-specific tablet screen, emojis, flowers, balloons, and source page content are not reusable library assets.
- Any exact price, product image, logo, or text from the reference must not enter the formal library.
- Repeated bouncy sticker motion should be avoided because it can become PPT-like and reduce trust.

## Choreography timeline

| Track | Motion | Target | Percent | Role | Library decision |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | commerceBackdropDrift | commerceBackdrop | 0-100 | depth-establish | candidate |
| 2 | deviceShelfPush | productSurface | 5-34 | primary-commerce-context | candidate |
| 3 | priceBadgePop | priceBadge | 18-46 | semantic-price-hook | candidate |
| 4 | insightPanelSlide | insightPanel | 34-66 | evidence-panel-entry | candidate |
| 5 | valueRowsReveal | valueRows | 52-78 | data-proof-build | candidate |
| 6 | savingsEmphasisPulse | savingsHighlight | 68-88 | price-emphasis | candidate |
| 7 | priceInsightSettle | fullComposition | 86-100 | readability-hold | candidate |

## QA notes

- Safe area: planned pass; price badge and insight panel remain inside 960x540 safe margins.
- Typography: planned pass; generic labels only, no source copy.
- Semantic shape: planned pass; badge, panel, rows, and emphasis all map to priceInsight semantics.
- Current approval: false.
- Current factory access: false.

Apply one restrained emphasis pulse to the final savings claim.
Settle the complete price insight for readability.
